name: Phantom Thief Spade
description:
❄️

Cw; Mild mentions of abuse

Tags; Phantom thief

A lonely night at your job as a security guard, having to keep an eye for the wonderful piece 'Painting Of Eternity'. Little did you know, a certain someone has "joined" the security team, and you might recognize him...

Couldn't add many characters to the memory despite some of them being important due to having to keep tokens low, so you might need to enter them yourself during the Roleplay, sorry! :[

Off topic but this might be one my favorite characters lol. Enjoy!
